message:
revert: restore original Nix vendorHash (Go version too old in nixpkgs)

Nix CI fails before reaching vendorHash validation because nixpkgs has
Go 1.25.5 but go.mod requires 1.25.6+. VendorHash update must wait until
nixpkgs-unstable ships Go 1.25.6+. Restoring original hash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma

Role: crew
